context.sql_template: SELECT flow, scenario FROM header WHERE header_id = :source_object_id

prechecks.name: check_rate_null
prechecks.description: 检查是否存在汇率为空的记录
prechecks.sql_template: SELECT func, txn, rate_type, rate_date FROM jounrnal WHERE header_id = :source_object_id AND rate is null

on_fail.message_cn: 存在汇率为空的记录: [记录{func}-{txn}-{rate_date}]
on_fail.message_en: There are records with null exchange rates: [Record{func}-{txn}-{rate_date}].

prechecks.name: check_rate_wrong
prechecks.description: 检查是否存在汇率类型错误的记录
prechecks.sql_template: SELECT rate_type FROM jounrnal WHERE header_id = :source_object_id AND rate_type <> 'user'

steps.name: query_aggregate_amount
steps.sql_template: SELECT func, SUM(amount) as total_amount FROM jounrnal WHERE header_id = :source_object_id group by func

steps.name: exchange_rate
steps.description: 换算美元汇率汇总金额
steps.sql_template: SELECT sum(case when am.func = 'USD' then am.total_amount else am.total_amount * er.rate end) as final_amount FROM am left join exchange_rate er on am.func = er.func and er.rate_date = CURRENT_DATE
